text.title: Exclusions, Reach Estimation, and Special Categories
text.summary: Exclusion targeting JSON, reach estimation API, audience size guidelines, and Special Ad Category restrictions.

rule.statement: Exclude recent purchasers (last 180 days) from all prospecting ad sets — this is a mandatory exclusion, not optional.
rule.rationale: Serving prospecting ads to existing customers wastes budget, increases frequency for people who have already converted, and distorts CPA reporting.

example.note: Response: users_lower_bound, users_upper_bound, estimate_dau. Target 500K-5M for interest targeting.

list.item: Under 1K — limited delivery, audience too narrow

rule.statement: Declare special_ad_categories at campaign creation for housing, employment, or credit ads — adding it retroactively requires campaign recreation.
rule.rationale: Meta enforces Special Ad Category restrictions at the campaign level; campaigns created without the flag cannot be retroactively converted and must be rebuilt.

list.item: Custom and lookalike audiences based on demographics are disallowed
